basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Junior Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released the official Jr. Project Attendant Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 on a contractual basis. Candidates who have passed 10th class and possess experience in large scale tests and field tests in geotechnical engineering are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 30 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walkin interview details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th class passed with the experience in large-scale tests and field tests in geotechnical engineering
qualification.details: 10th class passed with the experience in large-scale tests and field tests in geotechnical engineering.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: 10th class passed with the experience in large-scale tests and field tests in geotechnical engineering.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Salary 2026
IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment is Jr. Project Attendant.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Jr. Project Attendant post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Jr. Project Attendant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview is 30 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Jr. Project Attendant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is 10th class passed with relevant experience in geotechnical engineering tests.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Project Attendant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is between Rs. 24,300 to Rs. 31,700 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Jr. Project Attendant role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
